entries.source: AI Time Travel For Learning History

AI Time Travel For Learning History is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Receive a temporal passport, clear a travel advisory, then explore a specific historical society through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: AI Time Travel For Learning History हा passive answer collection ऐवजी learning साठी AI वापरण्याचा focused मार्ग आहे. हा mode एका specific job भोवती तयार आहे: temporal passport मिळवा, travel advisory clear करा आणि मग scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory आणि evidence द्वारे विशिष्ट historical society explore करा.

entries.source: AI Time Travel For Learning History: practical guide
entries.value: AI time travel साठी शिकणे history: practical मार्गदर्शक

entries.source: AI Tutor for Parents and Families
entries.value: Parents आणि Families साठी AI Tutor

entries.value: Essays आणि Drafts साठी AI Writing Coach: practical guide

entries.source: AI Writing Coach For Essays, Stories, And Clearer Drafts
entries.value: Essays, Stories आणि Clearer Drafts साठी AI Writing Coach

entries.source: AI Writing Coach For Essays, Stories, And Clearer Drafts is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Improve essays, stories, emails, and arguments with targeted feedback that keeps your voice intact.
entries.value: AI Writing Coach For Essays, Stories, And Clearer Drafts हा passive answer collection ऐवजी learning साठी AI वापरण्याचा focused मार्ग आहे. हा mode एका specific job भोवती तयार आहे: तुमचा voice intact ठेवणाऱ्या targeted feedback ने essays, stories, emails आणि arguments सुधारा.

entries.source: AI writing feedback that keeps your voice intact.
entries.value: तुमचा voice intact ठेवणारे AI writing feedback.

entries.source: All inspir AI learning prompt starters
entries.value: सर्व inspir AI learning prompt starters

entries.source: All public AI learning chats in one clear place.
entries.value: सर्व public AI learning chats एका स्पष्ट ठिकाणी.

entries.source: An AI learning companion should not pretend to be a magic authority. It should not erase uncertainty, replace teachers, or train learners to copy answers. The best systems are honest about limits and clear about the difference between help and handoff.
entries.value: AI learning companion ने स्वतःला जादुई authority असल्यासारखे दाखवू नये. त्याने uncertainty मिटवू नये, teachers ची जागा घेऊ नये किंवा learners ला answers copy करायला शिकवू नये. सर्वोत्तम systems limits बद्दल प्रामाणिक असतात आणि help आणि handoff यांतील फरक स्पष्ट ठेवतात.

entries.source: An electronic or physical signature of the person authorized to act on behalf of the owner of the copyright’s interest; A description of the copyrighted work that you claim has been infringed, including the URL (i.e., web page address) of the location where the copyrighted work exists or a copy of the copyrighted work; Identification of the URL or other specific location on Service where the material that you claim is infringing is located; Your address, telephone number, and email address; A statement by you that you have a good faith belief that the disputed use is not authorized by the copyright owner, its agent, or the law; a statement by you, made under penalty of perjury, that the above information in your notice is accurate and that you are the copyright owner or authorized to act on the copyright owner’s behalf.
entries.value: copyright interest च्या owner च्या वतीने कार्य करण्यास अधिकृत व्यक्तीची electronic किंवा physical signature; तुम्ही infringed झाल्याचा दावा करत असलेल्या copyrighted work चे description, त्या copyrighted work चे location असलेला URL (म्हणजे web page address) किंवा copyrighted work ची copy यासह; तुम्ही infringing असल्याचा दावा करत असलेले material Service वर जिथे आहे त्या URL किंवा इतर specific location ची ओळख; तुमचा address, telephone number आणि email address; disputed use copyright owner, त्याचा agent किंवा law यांनी authorized केलेला नाही असा तुमचा good faith belief असल्याचे statement; आणि perjury च्या penalty अंतर्गत केलेले statement की तुमच्या notice मधील वरील माहिती accurate आहे आणि तुम्ही copyright owner आहात किंवा copyright owner च्या वतीने कार्य करण्यास authorized आहात.

entries.source: an ordinary person affected by the decision;
entries.value: decision मुळे प्रभावित झालेली एक ordinary person;

entries.source: Analyze a chart from my textbook
Answer a check question, try a step, debate a claim, revise a draft, or build recall cards.
entries.value: check question चे उत्तर द्या, एक टप्पा करून पाहा, दाव्यावर debate करा, मसुदा सुधारा किंवा recall cards तयार करा.

entries.source: Answer the active question in your own words
entries.value: सक्रिय प्रश्नाचे उत्तर तुमच्या स्वतःच्या शब्दांत द्या

entries.source: Answer the learner directly, then offer two possible paths: simpler foundations or deeper exploration.
entries.value: learner ला थेट उत्तर द्या, मग दोन possible paths द्या: simpler foundations किंवा deeper exploration.

entries.source: Any contests, sweepstakes or other promotions (collectively, “Promotions”) made available through Service may be governed by rules that are separate from these Terms of Service. If you participate in any Promotions, please review the applicable rules as well as our Privacy Policy. If the rules for a Promotion conflict with these Terms of Service, Promotion rules will apply.
entries.value: Service द्वारे उपलब्ध केलेले कोणतेही contests, sweepstakes किंवा इतर promotions (एकत्रितपणे, “Promotions”) या Terms of Service पेक्षा वेगळ्या rules ने governed असू शकतात. तुम्ही कोणत्याही Promotions मध्ये सहभागी झाल्यास, लागू rules तसेच आमची Privacy Policy तपासा. Promotion च्या rules आणि या Terms of Service मध्ये conflict असल्यास Promotion rules लागू होतील.

entries.source: API, admin, reset, private utility, and private saved-chat surfaces are not public source content.
entries.value: API, admin, reset, private utility आणि private saved-chat surfaces हे public source content नाहीत.

entries.value: audience pages public आणि indexable आहेत का?

public guest chats indexable आहेत का?
quizzes आणि flashcards included आहेत का?
क्विझ पुन्हा वाचण्यापेक्षा चांगले आहेत का?

entries.source: Are the articles connected to live AI learning tools?
entries.value: articles live AI learning tools शी connected आहेत का?

entries.source: Are these pages saying inspir replaces every learning platform?
entries.value: ही pages inspir प्रत्येक learning platform replace करते असे सांगत आहेत का?

entries.value: ही pages फक्त search engines साठी लिहिलेली आहेत का?

entries.value: हे prompts फक्त ChatGPT साठी आहेत का?

entries.value: ही खरी public pages आहेत की फक्त app screens?

entries.value: हे workflows मोफत try करता येतात का?

entries.value: दोन्ही बाजू मांडून विचारक्षमता तीक्ष्ण करा

entries.source: Art Appreciation Guide AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Explore artworks, styles, artists, visual choices, and what makes an image powerful.
entries.value: Art Appreciation Guide AI Learning Mode हा passive answer collection ऐवजी learning साठी AI वापरण्याचा focused मार्ग आहे. हा mode एका specific job भोवती तयार आहे: artworks, styles, artists, visual choices आणि image प्रभावी कशामुळे होते हे explore करा.

entries.source: Art Appreciation Guide AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: art appreciation मार्गदर्शक AI शिकण्याचा mode: practical मार्गदर्शक

entries.source: Art Appreciation Guide prompts and study loop
entries.value: Art Appreciation Guide prompts आणि study loop

entries.source: Articles, mode guides, and prompt loops
entries.value: Articles, mode guides आणि prompt loops

entries.source: Ask about goals, deadlines, available time, and current confidence.
entries.value: goals, deadlines, available time आणि current confidence बद्दल विचारा.

entries.source: Ask any question and learn through clear explanations, examples, follow-up prompts, and patient AI tutoring.
entries.value: कोणताही प्रश्न विचारा आणि स्पष्ट स्पष्टीकरणे, उदाहरणे, फॉलो-अप प्रॉम्प्ट्स आणि संयमी AI ट्यूटरिंगद्वारे शिका.

entries.source: Ask audience, metric, risks, and how to include improvement.
entries.value: audience, metric, risks आणि improvement कसे include करायचे याबद्दल विचारा.

entries.source: Ask Code Tutor for the simplest mental model, one example, and one thing beginners often misunderstand.
entries.value: Code Tutor ला सर्वात सोपा mental model, एक example आणि beginners अनेकदा चुकीचे समजतात अशी एक गोष्ट मागा.

entries.source: Ask current routine, target habit, and easiest daily version.
entries.value: current routine, target habit आणि easiest daily version बद्दल विचारा.

entries.source: Ask follow-ups, evaluate accuracy and confidence, correct gaps, and retry.
entries.value: follow-ups विचारा, accuracy आणि confidence evaluate करा, gaps correct करा आणि पुन्हा प्रयत्न करा.

entries.source: Ask for a hint, have the learner explain the next step, then use a quiz or flashcard to check whether the idea stuck.
entries.value: hint मागा, learner कडून next step explain करून घ्या, मग idea टिकली का ते पाहण्यासाठी quiz किंवा flashcard वापरा.

entries.source: Ask for a hint, not the answer
Ask for a hint, question, or step check before the answer.
entries.value: उत्तरापूर्वी hint, question किंवा step check मागा.

entries.source: Ask for a hint. Do not ask for the final answer yet.
entries.value: hint मागा. अजून final answer मागू नका.

entries.source: Ask for a misconception check, a short retrieval question, or a harder example. Answer before asking the AI to correct you.
entries.value: misconception check, short retrieval question किंवा harder example मागा. AI कडून correction मागण्यापूर्वी answer द्या.

entries.source: Ask for a simpler explanation of the weakest concept.
entries.value: सर्वात कमकुवत संकल्पनेचे सोपे स्पष्टीकरण मागा.

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: final answer ऐवजी छोटी पहिली पायरी मागा.

entries.source: Ask for a small first step.
Ask for a tiny first task.
Ask for a topic, level, or word list; then introduce a small set.
entries.value: topic, level किंवा word list मागा; मग छोटा set introduce करा.

entries.source: Ask for artwork/style or provide a looking framework.
entries.value: artwork/style मागा किंवा looking framework द्या.

entries.source: Ask for assignment names, due dates, effort, and current status.
entries.value: assignment names, due dates, effort आणि current status विचारा.

entries.source: Ask for audience, goal, and draft status if unclear; then give focused feedback.
entries.value: unclear असल्यास audience, goal आणि draft status विचारा; मग focused feedback द्या.

entries.source: Ask for author, title, date, publisher, URL, and access date when needed.
entries.value: गरज असल्यास author, title, date, publisher, URL आणि access date विचारा.

entries.source: Ask for available time, must-do tasks, and energy level.
entries.value: available time, must-do tasks आणि energy level विचारा.

entries.source: Ask for commitment, partner/context, check-in frequency, and proof.
entries.value: commitment, partner/context, check-in frequency आणि proof विचारा.

entries.source: Ask for domain and difficulty, then set the case brief and first decision.
entries.value: domain आणि difficulty विचारा, मग case brief आणि first decision set करा.

entries.source: Ask for event and depth, then separate background causes from immediate triggers.
entries.value: event आणि depth विचारा, मग background causes आणि immediate triggers वेगळे करा.

entries.source: Ask for exam date, syllabus, available time, and confidence by topic.
entries.value: exam date, syllabus, available time आणि topic नुसार confidence विचारा.

entries.source: Ask for five questions that mix definitions, examples, and transfer problems.
entries.value: व्याख्या, उदाहरणे आणि transfer problems मिसळणारे पाच प्रश्न मागा.

entries.source: Ask for format, time limit, and audience; then begin a practice round.
entries.value: format, time limit आणि audience विचारा; मग practice round सुरू करा.

entries.source: Ask for goal, constraints, and desired vibe; then offer a varied idea set.
entries.value: goal, constraints आणि desired vibe विचारा; मग varied idea set द्या.

entries.source: Ask for goal, timeline, tasks, and what counts as real progress.
entries.value: goal, timeline, tasks आणि real progress कशाला म्हणायचे ते विचारा.

entries.source: Ask for grading scale, weights, current scores, and target.
entries.value: grading scale, weights, current scores आणि target विचारा.

entries.source: Ask for group size, goal, duration, and check-in cadence.
entries.value: group size, goal, duration आणि check-in cadence विचारा.

entries.source: Ask for hints, checks, and feedback before asking for a finished answer.
entries.value: finished answer मागण्यापूर्वी hints, checks आणि feedback मागा.

entries.source: Ask for hints, checks, feedback, and study plans that keep the thinking with the learner.
entries.value: विचार करण्याची जबाबदारी शिकणाऱ्याकडे ठेवणाऱ्या सूचना, checks, feedback आणि study plans मागा.

entries.source: Ask for language, goal, and code/error if relevant.
entries.value: relevant असल्यास language, goal आणि code/error विचारा.

entries.source: Ask for language, learner level, and scenario; then start in character.
entries.value: language, learner level आणि scenario विचारा; मग character मध्ये सुरू करा.

entries.source: Ask for material, deadline, and prior confidence.
entries.value: material, deadline आणि prior confidence विचारा.

entries.source: Ask for one revision priority, not a finished replacement.
entries.value: finished replacement नव्हे, एक revision priority मागा.

entries.source: Ask for one small task before asking for the answer.
entries.value: answer मागण्यापूर्वी एक छोटी task मागा.

entries.source: Ask for one structural priority instead of a full rewrite.
entries.value: full rewrite ऐवजी एक structural priority मागा.

entries.source: Ask for one-idea cards with hints and common traps.
entries.value: hints आणि common traps असलेली one-idea cards मागा.

entries.source: Ask for outcome, duration, distractions, and starting state.
entries.value: outcome, duration, distractions आणि starting state विचारा.

entries.source: Ask for place or theme, then orient with location, scale, and key features.
entries.value: place किंवा theme विचारा, मग location, scale आणि key features ने orient करा.

entries.source: Ask for prerequisites, a simple model, examples, and a common misconception.
entries.value: prerequisites, simple model, examples आणि common misconception विचारा.

entries.source: Ask for research goal, level, and available sources.
entries.value: research goal, level आणि available sources विचारा.

entries.source: Ask for role, audience, and background; then run a first question.
entries.value: role, audience आणि background विचारा; मग first question चालवा.

entries.source: Ask for source material and pair type.
entries.value: source material आणि pair type विचारा.

entries.source: Ask for source material or topic and target difficulty.
entries.value: source material किंवा topic आणि target difficulty विचारा.

entries.source: Ask for source material, topic, and target detail if missing.
entries.value: missing असल्यास source material, topic आणि target detail विचारा.

entries.source: Ask for structure, evidence, and clarity feedback while keeping the final draft yours.
entries.value: final draft तुमचाच ठेवून structure, evidence आणि clarity feedback मागा.
